title: Device Translation Table
text: Device Translation Table A Device Translation Table is a Development Object that maps Uniface output to device-specific output formats for printers and character-based (CHUI) screens. It makes it possible for Uniface to support a wide variety of hardware platforms, including their output devices. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: dtb Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: DeviceTableName @ LibraryName .dvc Specialization Device Translation Table specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a Library as parent object. It has no child development objects. For Windows platforms, device translation tables are used for enhanced printing but not for the GUI. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
